title: Lebanese Ask, ‘What Cease-Fire?’ as Israel and Hezbollah Trade Attacks in the South
summary_full: The fragile truce in Lebanon was extended after talks in Washington this week but has come under threat as Israel and Hezbollah have traded attacks.
summary_public: The fragile truce in Lebanon was extended after talks in Washington this week but has come under threat as Israel and Hezbollah have traded attacks.
